claim: Phi-4-Mini-Reasoning (3.8B params) achieves comparable reasoning to larger models via synthetic data distillation from DeepSeek-R1
actionable: Evaluate Phi-4-Mini-Reasoning for local reasoning tasks where model size and cost matter more than absolute capability
source_title: Phi-4 Reasoning - Microsoft Joins the Reasoning Race!!

claim: Phi-4 Reasoning training pipeline: continual pretraining with chain-of-thought → supervised fine-tuning → DPO alignment → RLVR (PPO + GRPO)
actionable: When fine-tuning small models for reasoning, apply continual pretraining with chains of thought before alignment
source_title: Phi-4 Reasoning - Microsoft Joins the Reasoning Race!!

claim: Phi-4 Reasoning distilled from o3-mini, Phi-4-Mini distilled from DeepSeek-R1 - purely distilled models don't reach quality of source models
actionable: Expect distilled models to underperform sources; combine distillation with reinforcement learning for meaningful improvements
source_title: Phi-4 Reasoning - Microsoft Joins the Reasoning Race!!

claim: Microsoft pursuing Phi models for local inference on Windows (CPU/GPU/NPU) as alternative to cloud API dependency for copilot features
actionable: Consider local deployment of Phi models as cost-effective alternative to API calls for on-device AI features
source_title: Phi-4 Reasoning - Microsoft Joins the Reasoning Race!!
